scope_boundary: The frozen three-seed held-out study measures specialist routing, generalist baselines, matched operation caps, adaptive/fixed/no-deliberation arms, and extra-compute harm, while route separability and zero fallback activation block broader routing claims and deterministic verification blocks model-scale deliberation claims.
transition_reason: The frozen three-seed held-out study measures specialist routing, generalist baselines, matched operation caps, adaptive/fixed/no-deliberation arms, and extra-compute harm, while route separability and zero fallback activation block broader routing claims and deterministic verification blocks model-scale deliberation claims.
